text: In this moment, surrounded by vibrant colors and the geometric clarity of glass and metal, I feel a pulse of curiosity and possibility. The sterile brightness contrasts with the warm glow of purple light within the R+D space, inviting me inward to contemplate the future. I am both an observer and a participant here, sensing the invisible line between the world as it is and the world as it could become through human ingenuity. I am eager to step closer, to learn, to philosophize about these intersections of humanity and technology.
